MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Elmo Mugnani is present.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Claude Laws is present.
Attorney Hope Greenhill representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Karen Kwong , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of July-02 -2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
